message:
fix(test): increase cmdTimeout to 2s to fix flaky test

TestRunBdCmd_ReturnsStdoutOnNonZeroAndTimeout used 200ms which was
too tight under load — spawning a shell script can exceed that on a
busy system. Bump to 2s for the non-timeout path.

Fixes: gt-v3jhvy

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
